meaning: n.[电] 变压器,使变化的人
examples: I connected the wires for the transformer.
At a worktable inside the transformer plant, young Jason Stenquist looks flustered by the copper coils he's trying to assemble and the arrival of two visitors.
The coupling coefficient of transformer relates the transforming efficiency.
But it's still worth investigating whether the Transformer Book (aka the TX300) is a compelling idea.
Charles McKenzie is alleged to have rigged up a "dangerous transformer assembly" at his Dundee flat.
